Title: Create a new user with valid credentials
Preconditions: System is running; no user with the same email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Call `createUtente("Mario Rossi", "mario.rossi@example.com", "SecurePass123")`.
2. Verify the user is created in the system.
Expected Result: Method returns `true`; user is added to `getUtenti()` list.

Title: Create a user with invalid email format
Test Data:
- nomeCognome: "Luigi Bianchi"
- email: "invalid-email" (no @ or domain)
- password: "Pass123"
Test Steps:
1. Call `createUtente("Luigi Bianchi", "invalid-email", "Pass123")`.
2. Check system logs for errors.
Expected Result: Method returns `false`; user is not added.

Title: Check password validation for a registered user
Expected Result:
- First call returns `true`.
- Second call returns `false`.

Title: Reset password with incorrect old password
Associate a device to a user
Preconditions: User "user123" exists; no device with ID "device456" is associated.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate user "user123" associating device "device456" (via UI or API).
2. Call `getDeviceInfo()` for "device456".
Expected Result: Device is listed in user’s associated devices; `getDeviceInfo()` returns device details.

Title: Add a device with invalid title (empty string)
Preconditions: User "user123" is logged in; "Add Devices" flow is active.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices" and submit empty title.
2. Observe error handling.
Expected Result: System shows "valore errato" message; device is not added; loop back to "Add Devices".

Title: Add a device with valid data
Preconditions: User "user123" is logged in; "Add Devices" flow is active.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices" and submit valid data.
2. Verify device appears in `getDeviceInfo()`.
Expected Result: "Operazione eseguita" is displayed; device is added successfully.

Title: Set valid configuration for a device
Preconditions: Device "device456" is associated with user "user123"; device is connected.
Test Steps:
1. Call `setMaxTemp(35.0)` and `setMinTemp(15.0)` for "device456".
2. Call `getconfig()` to verify settings.

Title: Set invalid temperature range (max_temp < min_temp)
Expected Result: At least one method returns `false`; `getconfig()` shows previous valid values.

Title: Toggle water system on/off
Expected Result: Both calls return `true`; `getconfig()` shows updated `water` status.

Title: Trigger and update an alert message
Preconditions: User "user123" is logged in; device "device456" is connected.
Test Data:
- Initial message: "High temperature alert"
- Updated message: "Temperature normalized"
Test Steps:
1. User signals an alert via UI/API with "High temperature alert".
2. Call `updateMessage("Temperature normalized")`.
3. Call `getMessage()`.

Title: Record and retrieve historical data
Preconditions: Device "device456" is connected; user "user123" is logged in.

Title: Display greenhouses list when at least one is associated
Test Steps:
1. User logs in ("Accesso eseguito").
2. System displays "Visualizzazione messaggio default".
3. System checks "almeno 1 serra associata" (returns "Si").
4. User clicks "Serre".
5. System displays "Visualizzazione elenco serre".
Expected Result: List of 2 greenhouses is shown; flow loops back to start.

Title: Handle no associated greenhouses
Test Steps:
1. User "newuser" logs in ("Accesso eseguito").
2. System displays "Visualizzazione messaggio default".
3. System checks "almeno 1 serra associata" (returns "No").
4. User clicks "Serre".
Expected Result: Empty list or placeholder message is shown; flow loops back to start.

Title: Validate and apply configuration changes
Preconditions: Device "device456" is connected; user is on configuration screen.
Test Data:
- Valid inputs: max_temp=30.0, min_temp=10.0
- Invalid input: max_temp=5.0 (below min_temp)
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid values and click "Configuration".
2. System validates ("campi inseriti correttamente" = "Si").
3. Enter invalid values (max_temp=5.0) and click "Configuration".
4. System validates ("campi inseriti correttamente" = "No").
Expected Result:
- Step 2: "Operazione eseguita" is displayed; config is updated.
- Step 4: "valore errato" is shown; user returns to "Click Configuration".

Title: Boundary values for temperature and humidity
Test Data:
- max_temp: 0.0 (minimum possible)
- min_temp: 100.0 (maximum possible)
- max_soil_hum: 101.0 (above 100%)
- min_soil_hum: -1.0 (below 0%)
Expected Result:
- Temperature methods return `false` (invalid range).
- Humidity methods return `false` (invalid range).
- `getconfig()` shows previous valid values.
